title: Music Definitions
description: The music_definitions.json file defines which music tracks play in different biomes and game states. Each key is a biome or game state identifier that maps to music event configuration. Located at sounds/music_definitions.json in resource packs.

biome_music.title: Biome/State Music
biome_music.description:
Music configuration keyed by biome identifier or game state (e.g., 'forest', 'desert', 'menu', 'creative', 'credits').

Properties:
• event_name (string)
• min_delay (int) = 60
• max_delay (int) = 180

event_name.title: Event Name
event_name.description: The sound event identifier that plays music for this biome/state (e.g., 'music.overworld.forest', 'music.game.nether').

min_delay.title: Minimum Delay
min_delay.description: The minimum delay in seconds before the music starts playing after entering this biome or after the previous track ends.

max_delay.title: Maximum Delay
max_delay.description: The maximum delay in seconds before the music starts playing. The actual delay is randomly chosen between min_delay and max_delay.

event_name.title: Event Name
event_name.description:
Sample values:
• music_definitions: music.overworld.forest
• music_definitions: music.menu
• music_definitions: music.game.credits
